steps.title: Identify the parallel structure requirement
steps.content: The phrase “Unlike most paintings in the florilegium,” introduces a contrast. The subject of the following clause must be comparable to “paintings”—logically, another artwork being contrasted with the florilegium collection.

steps.title: Apply parallel structure to the choices
steps.content: Option D makes “Chiliza's vignette” the subject—another painting, creating the required artwork-to-artwork comparison. The other three disrupt this parallel by using non-artwork subjects instead. That matches choice D — D is correct.
